title: Part Time Art Teacher
description:
About Thearthaus:

Thearthaus is a vibrant art studio dedicated to fostering creativity and artistic expression in individuals of all ages. We offer a range of engaging classes and workshops, providing a welcoming and inspiring environment for artistic exploration.


Job Summary:

We are seeking a passionate and experienced Art Instructor to join our team. You will be responsible for creating and delivering high-quality art lessons, providing guidance to students, and ensuring a positive and productive learning environment.


Responsibilities:

Curriculum & Instruction:

  • Create and conduct engaging art lessons for all curriculum and workshops, adhering to Thearthaus standards.
  • Develop lesson plans and materials that cater to students of diverse ages and skill levels.
  • Deliver instruction using a variety of teaching methods, including demonstrations, discussions, and hands-on activities.

Student & Parent Communication:

  • Provide regular feedback to parents regarding their child's class performance and progression.
  • Attend to student and parent inquiries, addressing concerns and providing helpful guidance.
  • Recommend suitable programs and classes based on student interests and skill levels.

Studio Operations:

  • Handle cashiering duties for payment processing and transactions.
  • Manage the scheduling of classes and workshops, ensuring efficient time management.
  • Perform administrative tasks as needed, including recordkeeping, correspondence, and inventory management.
  • Maintain a clean and organized studio environment, ensuring a safe and inspiring workspace for students.

Qualifications:

  • Proven experience teaching art to students of various ages, ideally in a studio setting.
  • Strong knowledge of art history, theory, and techniques, with a passion for sharing that knowledge.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, able to build rapport with students and parents.
  • Ability to create engaging and age-appropriate lesson plans that cater to diverse learning styles.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills, capable of juggling multiple tasks and managing schedules effectively.
  • A positive and enthusiastic attitude, with a genuine love for art and a desire to inspire creativity in others.

Bonus Points:

  • Experience with a specific art medium or style (e.g., painting, drawing, ceramics, digital art).
  • Knowledge of art business practices, including marketing, pricing, and customer service.
  • Proficiency in using technology for lesson planning, communication, and administrative tasks.

We offer:

  • A flexible work schedule that fits your availability.
  • A supportive and collaborative team environment.
  • The opportunity to share your passion for art and make a difference in the lives of students.

This job description serves as a guideline, and specific responsibilities and qualifications may vary based on the specific class or workshop you will be teaching.

postedCompany.description:
TheArthaus was established in 2011 out of our love for children and passion for art. We aim to create a space where children and adults are able to discover, explore and express freely the creativity in them in a stress free and cosy environment.

TheArthaus is a ‘process-based’ creative art studio which offers art courses for both children and adults that are specially designed to meet their needs. We provide possibilities for creation and promote conditions for appreciation

Students are given the opportunity to express themselves, to develop new habit and ways of looking at things from diverse perspectives. Students are given the freedom to explore, think out of the box and broaden their horizons.

We are made up of a team of committed & experienced art educators and practicing artists, who ensure quality teaching, sharing, and learning take place.
postedCompany.name: THEARTHAUS
